## Pre-flight

- [ ] I read [TROUBLESHOOTING.md](../../docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md).
- [ ] If this involves MCPs, I read [MCP-SETUP.md](../../docs/MCP-SETUP.md).
- [ ] I ran `./doctor.sh` and pasted the output below.
- [ ] I checked existing issues for duplicates.

## Environment

- dream-skill version (or commit SHA):
- OS / shell:
- Python version (`python3 --version`):
- Claude Code CLI version (`claude --version`):
- MCP tier in use (0 = none, 1 = filesystem, 2 = +notion/gmail/calendar):

## What you tried to do

One sentence. The command you ran or the result you expected.

## What actually happened

The output you got. Paste the relevant log lines. For LLM-shaped weirdness in the report, paste the offending section verbatim.

## Reproduction steps

```bash
# minimal commands to reproduce
```

## doctor.sh output

```
# paste full output of ./doctor.sh here
```

Screenshots, related issues, hunches.
